title: Tao Te Ching 53
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 53 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 53 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: If I have even just a little sense, I will walk on the main road and my only fear will be straying from it.
